topic: 5 Signs Your Business Is Ready for AI Automation (And 3 It Isn't)

manual_inputs.Topic: 5 Signs Your Business Is Ready for AI Automation (And 3 It Isn't)
manual_inputs.Secondary Keywords: business process automation AI · automate business operations · AI automation for small business · when to automate business processes
manual_inputs.Target Persona: Marcus T. — The Proof-Hungry Startup Founder (32–42, Founder/CEO, 5–30 employees, $500K–$5M revenue, USA/UAE/UK)
manual_inputs.Angle / Hook: Diagnostic / Self-qualifying content. Marcus knows AI exists but doesn't know if his business is ready. A checklist-style article that helps him self-select — and positions Arsuno.ai as the partner for businesses that ARE ready. The 'signs you're not ready' angle builds trust by showing honesty rather than pushing a hard sell.
manual_inputs.Internal Links: Arsuno.ai Features Page · AI Chat Support feature · Case Study (Recruitment USA)
manual_inputs.Notes: Avoid technical jargon. Use Marcus's exact language: 'Zapier', 'manual ops', 'proof of concept'. Lead with outcomes not features. No hype language (revolutionary, cutting-edge). Reference 60% reduction in operational overhead stat from homepage. Include a simple 5-sign checklist that could be screenshotted/shared on LinkedIn.
